education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Production / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Production
raw_text:
43. Tool Room Production Engineer

Job Summary  
Responsible for planning, coordinating, and executing tool room production activities to 
ensure timely delivery of tools, dies, molds, and fixtures.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Plan daily and weekly tool room production schedules  
• Coordinate with design, machining, and assembly teams  
• Monitor production progress and meet delivery timelines  
• Optimize machining processes and resource utilization  
• Ensure quality standards are maintained  
• Resolve p roduction -related issues  
Required Skills  
• Tool room operations and workflow knowledge  
• Production planning and scheduling  
• Basic CNC and machining knowledge  
• Problem -solving and coordination skills  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Prod uction  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹60,000 per month
